summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Nova AI application. All major features working correctly including home page, navigation, authentication, Studio IDE, and mobile responsiveness.

minor_issues.issue: Auth state may not persist between page refreshes/navigations
minor_issues.impact: User might need to re-login after page refresh
minor_issues.note: This might be expected behavior for mock authentication

passed_tests: Home page loads with correct hero headline
Waitlist form validation and success flow
Navigation between all routes (Home, Academy, Marketplace, Studio)
Academy page shows 'Coming Soon' badge and correct subtext
Marketplace displays 3 agent cards with disabled buttons
Login validation - error for invalid email, success for admin@nova.ai
Studio page with 3 panes (chat, canvas, code)
Studio chat functionality with toast notifications
Protected route redirects to login when not authenticated
Footer with correct copyright and contact information
Toast notifications working correctly throughout app
